subcodes.first_line: Give thanks unto God for having enabled thee to circle round the Most Great House and for having granted thee the bounty of attaining unto the Most Great Pilgrimage. Render praise and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان اشکر الله بما وفقک علی الطواف حول البیت الاعظم و فزت بالحج الاکبر ان احمد و
subcodes.subjects: @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God, @law of pilgrimage, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
